response.justification: Strong full-stack engineer with 20 years of experience and proven ability to build across multiple domains, but lacks the demonstrated AI/ML expertise that is central to this Principal Engineer role. Currently working on AI-agent infrastructure at re:cinq (started April 2025), which aligns with the strategic direction, but this is very recent and they have no prior AI products, research, or recognized expertise in the space. Technical fundamentals are excellent; the gap is specialized AI depth and Director-level strategic experience.
strengths: Exceeds experience requirement with 20 years in software engineering and progression to staff-level IC positions
Proven builder with demonstrated ability to create and lead projects across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains (GISCollective, open-source libraries, workshops)
Currently positioned in AI-focused role at re:cinq working on MCP frameworks and AI-agent infrastructure, showing active engagement with cutting-edge technology
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise—lacks prior AI projects, advanced degree in AI, published research, or recognized expertise in the space despite role emphasizing 'Specialized Software (AI Strategy)'
Very recent entry to AI work (1-2 months at re:cinq) means expertise is still being built rather than already established at the level required for Principal Engineer

Limited evidence of Director-level strategic leadership—currently at Staff level with mentoring through workshops and talks, but no clear track record of shaping technical strategy or organizational direction at scale

key_factors.factor: Lack of demonstrated AI/ML expertise and portfolio
Exceeds minimum experience requirement (20 vs. 15 years)
Missing Director-level strategic leadership track record
